# aikido_zen_app_bot_lists (Resource)

Manages bot list subscriptions for a Zen app in Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_zen_app_bot_lists" "api" {
  app_id = aikido_zen_app.api.id

  bots {
    code = "scrapers"
    mode = "block"
  }

  bots {
    code = "ai_scrapers"
    mode = "monitor"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) The ID of the Zen app.
- `bots` (Attributes List) Bot list subscriptions. Omitted categories default to `ignore`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bots))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--bots"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bots`

Required:

- `code` (String) The bot category code.
- `mode` (String) Subscription mode: `monitor` or `block`.
